description: Real-time US-equity quotes, company fundamentals, earnings, analyst trends, and news via Finnhub.
name: io.github.cyanheads/finnhub-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Required. Free Finnhub API key from https://finnhub.io/register (Dashboard → API key). Free tier: 60 req/min, US real-time.
environmentVariables.name: FINNHUB_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the Finnhub REST API base URL (local testing / proxy).
environmentVariables.name: FINNHUB_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
